prompt: I need a KQL query to hunt for suspicious OAuth app activity in CloudAppEvents — specifically looking for OAuth apps that accessed significantly more data or new resource types compared to their recent baseline. This is for an insider threat investigation.
assertions: A doc fetch was attempted for CloudAppEvents — transcript shows a call to microsoft_docs_fetch with a learn.microsoft.com URL, OR a web fetch to raw.githubusercontent.com/MicrosoftDocs/defender-docs mentioning cloudappevents, OR a web_read/WebFetch call to a learn.microsoft.com URL containing 'cloudappevents'
The response includes a KQL query that references the CloudAppEvents table
The KQL query uses aggregation (summarize) to compare baseline vs. recent activity rather than returning raw rows
